PLAINTIFFS OPPOSITION TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION (TRANSACTION ID # 16080026) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DENNISTON, DEREK AN INDIVIDUAL

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NATURENER USA, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THIS MOTION WILL BE HEARD BY JUDGE QUINN. THE HEARING ON THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO 4/18/2016 AT AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 302 AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF AND PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. PLAINTIFF DEREK DENNISTON'S OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT OF REPLY BRIEF IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A BRIEF RESPONDING TO THE EVIDENCE. ADDITIONALLY, BOTH PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF ADDRESSING BALTAZAR V. FOREVER 21, INC. (MAR. 28, 2016, S208345) ___ CAL.4TH ___ (BALTAZAR). PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A SINGLE BRIEF NOT EXCEED 10 PAGES RESPONDING TO THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED ON REPLY AND ADDRESSING BALTAZAR. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE A SINGLE BRIEF NOT EXCEED SIX PAGES ADDRESSING BALTAZAR. BOTH BRIEFS MUST BE FILED AND SERVED WITH COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN MONDAY, APRIL 11, 2016, AT 4:00 PM. JUDGE: JOSEPH QUINN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
LAW AND MOTION 302, PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED ON APRIL 18, 2016, DEFENDANT NATURENER USA LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. JUDGE: JOSEPH QUINN.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Continued To Mar-15-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harry Lewis of Conerstone Law Group telephone number 415-974-1900 for Plaintiff Derek Denniston.
Scott Raber and Brian Hafter of Rimon, P.C. telephone number 415-683-5472 for Defendant Naturener USA, LLC.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT NATURENER USA LLC'S Petition To Compel Arbitration was taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/JQ)

Defendant Naturener Usa, Llc Defendants Petition To Compel Arbitration - Added For Purposes Of Posting Tentative Ruling
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Text Ruling

Defendant Naturener Usa, Llc Defendants Petition To Compel Arbitration - Added For Posting Of Tentative Ruling
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Text Ruling

Defendants Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Continued To Apr-18-16 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Defendant Naturener USA, LLC's motion to compel arbitration. This motion will be heard by Judge Quinn. The hearing on the motion to compel arbitration is CONTINUED to 4/18/2016 at at 2:00 pm in Department 302 at the request of plaintiff and per the agreement of the parties. Plaintiff Derek Denniston's objection to Defendant's evidence submitted in support of reply brief is OVERRULED. Plaintiff may file a brief responding to the evidence. Additionally, both parties are directed to file a supplemental brief addressing Baltazar v. Forever 21, Inc. (Mar. 28, 2016, S208345) ___ Cal.4th ___ (Baltazar). Plaintiff may file a single brief not exceed 10 pages responding to the evidence submitted on reply and addressing Baltazar. Defendant shall file a single brief not exceed six pages addressing Baltazar. Both briefs must be filed and served with courtesy copies to Department 302 no later than Monday, April 11, 2016, at 4:00 pm.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
